item.title: Add Managed Agents memory stores page to claude-api skill (#1014)
item.description: Add shared/managed-agents-memory.md covering the Memory Stores public beta under managed-agents-2026-04-01: object model (memstore_/mem_/ memver_), create + seed, attach via resources[] at session-create time, FUSE mount at /mnt/memory/<store>/, host-side CRUD with create-by-path vs update-by-id, co
